data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Design complete — 5 scenarios x 7 consumers = 35 tests. Scenarios: (1) normal commit, (2) MERGE_HEAD present, (3) REBASE_HEAD+rebase-merge, (4) REBASE_HEAD+rebase-apply, (5) MERGE_HEAD==HEAD guard. Consumers: review-gate, test-gate, record-test-status, compute-diff-hash, capture-review-diff, classifier, merge-to-main. Writing test file now ✓
